creator: mcglk@artlogix.com
text:
math/rascal's old distfile (0.1.3) is no longer available at the FTP sites.  The port needed to be updated to 0.1.5.

Fix: 

Change PORTVERSION in Makefile to

PORTVERSION=    0.1.5

Change distinfo to

MD5 (rascal-0.1.5.tar.gz) = e180b6836847b7946bac28acc5f21cd3

That's it.  Transfers, compiles and installs cleanly.
How-To-Repeat: make

You get a whole bunch of "file not found" errors from the FTP sites.
